rationale_source: F1.MP inference via R10-G + R11-A refinance carve-out: TT=refinance + existing-lender match across sources + balance present → infer mortgage_position from existence of first mortgage

mortgage_position.rationale: Broker silent on MP. transaction_type=refinance + existing_mortgage_lender RBC + first_mortgage_balance $225k all consistent. R10-G + R11-A refinance carve-out: existing 1st mortgage present + refinance intent → new loan is 2nd-position. F1.MP inferred-tier.
